name: opensource-compass
description: AI-powered developer platform for discovering, understanding, and contributing to open-source GitHub projects.

scripts.dev: npm run build -w @opensource-compass/shared && concurrently -n shared,backend,frontend "npm run dev -w @opensource-compass/shared" "npm run dev -w @opensource-compass/backend" "npm run dev -w @opensource-compass/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @opensource-compass/shared && npm run build -w @opensource-compass/backend && npm run build -w @opensource-compass/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @opensource-compass/shared && npm run build -w @opensource-compass/shared && npm run typecheck -w @opensource-compass/backend && npm run typecheck -w @opensource-compass/frontend
